name: Lockehorn
author: Poki
description: Go on a chilling adventure in Lockehorn! In this physics-based puzzle game made by Nitrome, you play as a little elk named Lockehorn who's friends have been frozen by the Big Freeze. It's up to you to rescue them and defeat the evil snow spirits in the process. To defeat the spirits, you can use the blocks of ice. Crushing your enemies between the walls and the blocks of ice will defeat them! Got a friend around? Then you can play together! Can you free all of Lockhorne's friends? How to play Lockehorn? Use WASD or the arrow keys to move! Who created Lockehorn? Lockehorn is created by Nitrome. Play their other games on Poki: Bad Ice-Cream , Double Edged and Dangle How can I play Lockehorn for free? You can play Lockehorn for free on Poki. Can I play Lockehorn on mobile devices and desktop? Lockehorn can be played on your computer only. Can I play Lockehorn with my friend? Yes! Lockehorn is a local multiplayer game so you can play with your friend at the same computer!
